title: matricaria segetum
intro: Matricaria segetum, also known as false chamomile or wild chamomile, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is commonly used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Matricaria segetum include its ability to calm the nervous system, alleviate menstrual cramps, and promote relaxation, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Matricaria segetum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which are available in health food stores and online.
